tripHistory.title: Natural Body Ozone Park — bulk supplement restock
tripHistory.body:
# 2026-04-27 — Natural Body Ozone Park bulk restock

## How it went

Made up for the closed-store miss from 4/26 by going to **Ozone Park** instead of Hicksville. Sumaiya served you. Big planned restock — 6-10 weeks of supplement supply locked in. Total **$352.87 paid** ($409 list, saved $56.13 loyalty + $55.92 promos = **$112 in savings**).

## What was bought

**Whey × 3 ($135)** — Musclesport Lean Whey Gourmet
- Strawberry Banana Royale
- Peanut Butter Cookies & Cream
- Chocolate Chocolate Chip
- 25 servings each = **75 servings total** ≈ 10-12 weeks of post-workout

**Test booster × 2 ($120)** — Enhanced Labs Top T (120 caps each = 240 caps total)

**Pre-workouts ($93)**
- Core Pump Black — Red Alert (20 servings)
- Core Fury Black — Tropical Storm (20 servings)
- = 40 sessions

**Fat burner ($30)** — Musclesport CarniShred + Mitoburn (Baja Splash, 31 servings)

**Energy drinks ($31, 12 cans)** — Ghost RTD variety: 7UP Lemon Lime, Sour Patch Kids Redberry, Raspberry Cream, Swedish Fish, Welch's Grape Cran, Welch's Grape

## Best-price find 🏆

**Ghost Energy at Natural Body — $2.50/can on the 2-for-$5 promo** (vs $3.42/can singles at Vitamin Shoppe = 27% less). Plus full 12-pack cases at $2.25/can on prior trips.

## Carry forward to next trip

- **Fiducia supplement** — still pending from 4/26

tripHistory.title: Two-store run + Vitamin Shoppe stop
tripHistory.body:
# 2026-04-26 — Two-store run + Vitamin Shoppe stop

## How it went

Solid trip, bigger than planned. Hit BJ's and Costco in the wrong order from the planned route, then made a side stop at Vitamin Shoppe Oceanside for some Ghost flavors not at Natural Body's Costco-friendly variety. **Natural Body Hicksville was the last stop on the original plan — but it was closed by the time we got there.** Fiducia supplement carries forward.

## Route — actual vs planned

| | Planned | Actual |
|---|---|---|
| 1st stop | BJ's (Garden City) | **Costco (Westbury)** |
| 2nd stop | Costco (Westbury) | **BJ's (Garden City)** |
| 3rd stop | Natural Body (Hicksville) | **Natural Body (Hicksville) — CLOSED** |
| Side stop | — | The Vitamin Shoppe (Oceanside) |

**Lesson:** check Natural Body Hicksville hours before next trip. Or default to Ozone Park location, which has been the reliable one (4/27 worked fine).

## Spend — planned vs actual

| | Planned | Actual | Delta |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Natural Body | $80 | $0 (closed) | −$80 |
| BJ's | $15-20 | $119.88 | +$100 |
| Costco | $30-40 | $35.66 | even |
| Vitamin Shoppe | — | $22.31 | new |
| Mom care package | — | $13.98 | new (separate) |
| **Your total** | **~$135** | **$177.85** | **+$43** |

BJ's overshot because of impulse adds (turkey, Chobani drinks, tomatoes, Dash cooker). Costco came in under because we skipped avocados and bought potatoes at BJ's instead. Net: still well under monthly budget.

## What went well ✅

- **Avocados → KS Guacamole Singles ($11.99) swap** — better $/serving and pre-portioned. Smart.
- **Got the Dash 16-Pc Egg Cooker ($19.98)** — already in heavy rotation by Tuesday.
- **Spinach restock + iceberg lettuce** — caught the price bump on lettuce ($1.99 → $2.49) so we know about it now.
- **Mom's care package handled cleanly** ($13.98 kept separate from your budget).

## What got missed ❌ — carry forward

- **Fage Greek Yogurt 48oz** ($7.79 at Costco) — Tiffany asked for actual yogurt, we came home with Chobani protein drinks instead. Not the same thing.
- **Fiducia supplement** — Natural Body Hicksville closed. Carries to next supplement run.

## Impulse / off-list buys 💰

| Item | Cost | Verdict |
|------|-----:|---------|
| Butterball Lean Turkey 48oz | $15.99 | Good — protein for prep |
| Chobani 20g Protein Drinks 8ct | $13.99 | Misalignment — meant to get yogurt |
| Angel Sweet Grape Tomatoes 2lbs | $6.99 | Good — salad base |
| Green Onions (Costco) | $5.99 | Good — meal prep |
| Dash 16-Pc Egg Cooker | $19.98 | Best impulse buy — actively using it |

## Price moves caught 🔍

- **Iceberg Lettuce: $1.99 → $2.49 at BJ's** (+25%) — flagged
- **ACE Sourdough Bistro: $5.69** — stable since 3/8
- **Almond Breeze Vanilla 96oz: $4.69** — same as baseline

## For next trip

- Add **Fage Greek Yogurt 48oz** (Costco) to Need Now
- Add **Fiducia supplement** to Natural Body list — verify Ozone Park hours
- Bryan/Tiffany check: confirm whether Chobani drinks vs Fage yogurt was the actual ask

insights.label: Price up
insights.text: Iceberg lettuce at BJ's: $1.99 (4/17) → $2.49 (4/26) — +25% in 9 days. Watch this.

insights.label: Price drop
insights.text: Coke Zero 35pk at Costco: $23.04 (3/8) → $21.29 (4/17) — −7.6%. Stock up if you'll go through it.

insights.label: Best deal found
insights.text: Ghost Energy cases at Natural Body: $2.25/can in 12-packs. Beats Vitamin Shoppe singles ($3.49/can) by 35%.

insights.label: Restock due
insights.text: Fage Greek Yogurt 48oz — Tiffany's pick, missed on 4/26 (came home with Chobani drinks instead). Add to next Costco trip.

insights.label: Budget pace
insights.text: April supplements $429 / $300 target — first month over. Bulk restocks happen every 2-3 months; expect lower May.
